scripts.test: npx tsx scripts/create-test-db.ts && npx playwright test
scripts.test:ui: npx tsx scripts/create-test-db.ts && npx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:headed: npx tsx scripts/create-test-db.ts && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:agent: E2E_AGENT=1 npx tsx scripts/create-test-db.ts && E2E_AGENT=1 npx playwright test --max-failures=1
